description:
A fantastic app to provide scroll lyrics for Spotify and other apps


1. [Fix] Apple Music Lyrics mobile style artwork crop.
2. [Add] it-IT internationalization by pascal-00.
3. [Add] Mobile mode for more pages.
4. [Fix] Optimize pages performance。
5. [Add] New settings page.
6. [Add] Microsoft Store license detection for non-Store versions.
7. [Add] Fullscreen lyrics auto hide for Dynamic Lyrics Island and Desktop Lyrics.
8. [Add] Multi-display support for Taskbar Lyrics.
9. [Add] Option to disable force topmost in Desktop Lyrics.
10. [Add] What's New dialog.
11. [Fix] Optimize Apple Music Lyrics performance (up to 2x).
12. [Fix] Breathing Dots issue with multi-line highlight.
13. [Fix] Fix Isolation palatte algorithm.
14. [Add] Track info marquee in Apple Music Lyrics.
15. [Add] Plus Lighter blend mode in Apple Music Lyrics.
16. [Fix] Taskbar Lyrics NotifyIcon area recognition.
17. [Fix] Background Vocals flyout animation with pulling effect.
18. [Fix] Change Apple Music Lyrics vertical layout conditions.
19. [Add] Taskbar Lyrics polling frequency option.
